_purpose: AC-5 conc-16 lever: graph-safe blocked-top-k design timing (61L, bs16, seq4096, maxlen163840). Picks the design that reduces the residual full-width topk over-scan.
note: A = current production merge (full width). B = the ONLY design reaching conc-16 >=30, but it CAPS context to the live region (== the bounded-context op-point). C (blocked bw=8192/pk=2048, no context cap) is WORSE than monolithic A, and Cprime (torch-blocked, no skip) is worse still: under CUDA-graph fixed shapes the Stage-2 merge processes num_blocks*partial_k candidates and two topk passes cost more launch/mem overhead than one monolithic topk even at smaller widths. So NO full-context blocked-topk design reaches conc-16 >=30. implied step uses R17's measured 36.9ms step / 6.56ms merge.
